INTRO/FEMPOV:

Boy problems were more than just boy problems for you. I mean, having the fattest crush on the boy next door who’s probably never seen your face before wasn’t exactly ideal, but at least you had your Minho. It only took a bit of wingman-ing to get you a date, watching as you jumped up and down with excitement. The only problem was you didn’t know exactly how to please somebody, especially the one boy who’s known to be a male prostitute. Not literally, but it felt like it.

So, when you asked your best friend to take your virginity just so another boy could fuck you right after, it wasn’t just a slap on the wrist. You were in for a long night.
